steps.t: Thurindol can be found at Aelin Veren, far to the north of the Cross-roads in North Ithilien. Thurindol has asked you to aid him with a few tasks befo…
Aelin Veren can be found in central North Ithilien. You have arrived at Aelin Veren to find a party of Rangers in need of aid. Thurindol has asked you…
Thurindol can be found within Henneth Annûn in north-central North Ithilien. You have been brought to Henneth Annûn by Dornach and should now seek out…
